item.title: Images of Note: Lunch
item.description:
good idea
Yeah this is basically it.
y'arr
owo
@elbowdeepinahorse is a legend.
Sleep parkour!
yeah
Pro-Scottish Independence but fuck Alex Salmond...and fuck the Alba Party.
Nine more and they're president.
Hell yeah
HELL YEAH
jkasasdjkdas
My Mum: "Close the door, were you born in a barn?" Me: "I was born in an NHS Hospital at the end of the Thatcher Administration so yes."
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging

item.title: 13/? Mrs. Puff from Apongebob
item.description: “Merciful Neptune!” 13/?? Mrs. Puff from SpongeBob I am doing a costume a day for the entire month and I am raising money for charity while doing so! Read more about it here :) https://imgur.com/gallery/see-y-all-tomorrow-GJKtKLD
item.dc:creator: josiemarcellino

item.title: Backlogged memes: I bet my battery dies uploading this
item.description:
My hero
They should do that for all questions. I’m curious and don’t like being judged.
It’s 1000$ don’t even look at it just move along just keep it moving it’s not even that pretty
Fall is an actual thing here and it’s lovely! This is a first. In Texas it’s still summer. But in Germany??? GLUHWEIN SEASON. (It doesn’t have any glue in it. It’s hot spiced wine and it’s awful but the Germans do insist and they know how to do Christmas RIGHT)
They’re gonna hurt your feelings. Guaranteed.
This person gets it. My husband wants to make like a Soviet space program control board for our son and he was like talk me out of it and I was like no way that sounds awesome
There really is a lot of time in the day and I’m mad at former me for not writing more. Depressed ass bitch. What do you mean you’re not “feeling inspired” open your goddamn laptop
@CodyBurkett this one was either made for you or made BY you
It’s why I get my very own duvet! My son takes it one step further and sleep crawls all over the place and ends up by my feet or curled up against my back or with his feet in my face. How can someone so small take up an entire bed.
I use wax actually it works rather well
Did you know if you ask for an Americano here they just give you a black coffee? In America it’s a whole ass drink with milk and stuff in it. This doesn’t say anything good about Americans does it
Gurl, same
I just really liked this artwork. This part always gets me
It’s true I would
That’s def the kind of ghost I wanna be when I die Speaking of, this spooky season I recommend The Blackening, Cabin in the Woods, and Paranorman, lately I have been in a horror comedy mood (paranorman is like horror for kids which is weird but I’m down for it, it’s such a cute movie, Coraline is also a good one of these) Genuinely scary recommendations are as always The Haunting of Hill House and Sinister, and if you’re exploring the Conjureverse the only good ones are Conjuring 1, Annabelle Comes Home, annabelle creation, and The Nun, the other ones are wastes of time, although I was appropriately creeped out by conjuring 2. I’m always taking recommendations also!
local man discovers that reality is unskippable, more at 11 (the premise of Click btw, but I do think the story would’ve hit harder if the remote hadn’t glitched, really the guy was taken advantage of by a bait and switch faulty bed bath and beyond product, it wasn’t predictable and yet inevitable due to his nature)
This is the B plot of my book. Assassin breaks in to kill a king but lets him live if he marries her and she becomes his spymaster but every once in awhile they have sex at knifepoint and he pretends like it’s a mild inconvenience but he’s secretly into it. He’s weird. Buuuut the main couple is still underage so it was our only option for some heat in book 1.
Oops Guess whose son is old enough now to show signs of autism…..I’m thrilled but also terrified send help
I mean this was back when whaling was a thing right? Why not let the guy hunt his whale? Cmon guys you could eat it after and everything
Oooooooooooooof Then again this was nearly ten years ago and nobody’s done fucking anything so I’m sure it’ll just get worse
Actually that first bit is very accurate from what I’ve heard, everyone forms a lovely little community. The father in law goes every year. Pretty sure the next camp over is all sex and drugs though
This deserves to be seen by the world
I love throwing stuff like this into books. Characters do tiny things like this and it makes them just instantly lovable. One of them does this exact thing with little kids’ clothes he’s my favorite
BRO TOOK THE WHOLE SQUAD DOWN
That or a prepubescent boy
My book is technically a hamlet retelling. Happened on accident, I watched a lot of lion king growing up
I’d so read this
I want it
And it’ll take me 500k when I write my novel about the gay vampire dads shush
I recommend this highly
I need this too. Maybe I just like wooden furniture
This is how I got the second cat in the first place
…and that is my legal defense your honor
Thrice now!
Or Anne. Or Leigh. Or Elizabeth.
It does seem like a lot of work
Oh good I needed a new hacksaw for my many crimes
P&P memes as per request Darcy is the most autistic mf in the universe
Oh, Darcy. A guy tried this line on me once (not like a quote, like he liked me despite me being not good enough) and we deeeefinitely did not get married.
She’d have you believe it’s a universal truth
Obligatory ad for my book. Trope cloud. You’ll like it. I ran out of advanced copies! A few imgurians got the last ones… they’re in a suitcase right now on a plane headed to America. All signed and stuff. Very exciting. The advanced copies are special and look different and are pretty
That’s my time, later dorks, stay dorky
item.dc:creator: kirbyvictorious

item.title: "I thought those fighting hard for peace in Gaza would deserve it." - Says Toshiyuki Mimaki, the Japanese anti-nuclear campaigner whose group, Nihon Hidankyo, won the Nobel Peace Prize.
item.description: "The images of the children in Gaza covered with blood, held by their parents remind of Japan 80 years ago."
item.dc:creator: SayNoToGenocide

item.title: Memes vol 370 X-Men
item.description:
I’m not sure why I posted this because I do ship Cherik
I think maybe Lucas drew this
YOU MEAN DERISION?!?!
This was the golden age of comics
PRODIGY!!!!
I think he’s writing his name but yeah
BUTCH WOLVERINE
Nessie tax
The blatant favoritism is crazy- Scruffy, Froggy, and Liza Jane tax
item.dc:creator: danat101

item.title: Sunday funday . . .
item.description:
Accents--am I right?
Today in Texas predicted to be 101 F--FFS it's OCTOBER!!
Idiots--not water pistol--ice skate . . .
I'm not sexist, really . . .
Truly, I'm not sexist . . .
One of the best children's show back in the day--son and I both loved it!!

item.title: An eclectic dump of no particular theme (Memes, Vids, Art, Gifs, etc)
item.description:
from "After the Thin Man" (1936)
CloakerJosh - https://imgur.com/gallery/P9ppb4p
Two great Dames
Source: https://www.tumblr.com/stealingpotatoes
Source: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5VGLPP70Xtw
Originally painted by David Jonas and used in the 1968 Disney film "Blackbeard's Ghost", it was also featured for a time in Disneyland's "Pirates of the Caribbean" ride
Source: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zwJTEI_SzwA
More about his work on the score can be found here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TxLnRknhNOY
Artist sources: https://nitter.poast.org/DevinElleKurtz https://www.devinellekurtz.com/ https://www.instagram.com/devinellekurtz/ https://www.deviantart.com/tamberella
Source: https://www.tumblr.com/uzuriartonline
The sofa king strikes again!
from Nightcrawler (1985) # 2
from "A Southern Yankee" (1948)
Source: https://www.reddit.com/user/Agoo
from "Beer Barrel Polecats" (1946)
Source: https://www.instagram.com/jorge_molinam/
Source: https://www.tumblr.com/arttuff/757302357629566976/young-justice-vs-the-titans-is-a-very-bullying
https://imgur.com/gallery/UwUFvL3 Though in all seriousness, this is a terrific idea (I've already selected to follow @Ngugi and @BabyFarkMcGeeZax )
Source: https://www.tumblr.com/sabellart
Source: https://www.tumblr.com/stealingpotatoes
Chris Carter cited the series as having a "tremendous influence" in his creating "The X-Files" in 1993.
Source: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4hMRRWzACpM
from Al Jolson's "Wonder Bar"
from "Critters" (1986)
Source: https://www.tumblr.com/wobubling
around the same time as the Muppets at Britain's Elstree Studios. "Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back" was also filming there at the exact same time.
Source: https://www.tumblr.com/nathsketch

item.title: Phone-clearing dump 155
item.description:
Look, these are all dumped straight from my phone - nothing curated or red threads going on here
It’s just unadulterated nonsense and whatever caught my eye at the time
Welcome to my brain. (Sorry about the mess)
(We’ve now reached December 2023, many thanks to everyone that’s voted and/or commented!)
Norway trampling indigenous rights
item.dc:creator: indigenous101
